Married: before 1136 in Peebles-shire, Scotland to Maria Unknown …

zh.Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾可雷南
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fraser of Peebles於大約1118年出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾時，他的父親Gilbert Fraser21歲，母親Margaret Alpin17歲。他於1136年之前與Maria Fraser在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1200年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍享年84歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾可雷南
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fraser of Peebles于大约1118年出生在苏格兰皮布萊爾时，他的父亲Gilbert Fraser21岁，母亲Margaret Alpin17岁。他于1136年之前与Maria Fraser在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1200年在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍享年84岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Fraser of Peebles was born about 1118, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, his father, Gilbert Fraser, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Alpin, was 17. He married Maria Fraser before 1136, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1200, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 84, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fraser of Peebles est né environ 1118, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, son père, Gilbert Fraser, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Alpin, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Maria Fraser avant 1136, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1200, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fraser of Peebles um 1118 in Peeblesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Fraser 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Alpin 17. Er hat vor 1136 in Scotland Maria Fraser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1200 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fraser of Peebles è nato il circa 1118 nel Peeblesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Gilbert Fraser, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Alpin, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Maria Fraser prima del 1136, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1200, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fraser of Peeblesが約1118年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert Fraserは21歳，母Margaret Alpinは17歳であった。1136年以前にスコットランドでMaria Fraserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1200年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで84歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fraser of Peebles(이)가 대략 1118년 스컷랜드 피블레실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Fraser(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Alpin(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1136년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Maria Fraser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1200년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1118–about 1200: tany ho any amin'ny 1118–tany ho any amin'ny 1200

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fraser of Peebles nasceu aproximadamente 1118, em Peeblesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gilbert Fraser, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Alpin, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Fraser antes 1136, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1200, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fraser of Peebles родился около 1118 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Fraser было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Alpin, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Fraser перед 1136 г. в местности Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1200 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

sm.about 1118–about 1200: e tusa o le 1118–e tusa o le 1200

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fraser of Peebles nació aproximadamente 1118, en Peeblesshire, Scotland, su papá, Gilbert Fraser, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Alpin, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Maria Fraser antes de 1136, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1200, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Argyll, Scotland.
